texto: It is cruel, you know, that music should be so beautiful. It has the beauty of loneliness of pain: of strength and freedom. The beauty of disappointment and never-satisfied love. The cruel beauty of nature and everlasting beauty of monotony.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Benjamin Britten sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “It is cruel, you know, that music should be so beautiful. It has the beauty of loneliness of pain…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, music, beauty, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: I am an arrogant and impatient listener but in the case of a few composers a very few when I hear a work I do not like I am convinced that it is my own fault. Verdi is one of those composers.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Benjamin Britten: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I am an arrogant and impatient listener but in the case of a few composers a very few when I hear…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, music, composers pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao.
